column1: Provider Recommendations - EOD Daily + Basic Fields + Python-Friendly - Last Updated: 2026-05-16

column5: RATIONALE
Single provider per market with Greeks. IVolatility covers equity+index+CME futures.
Dhan: Greeks+Python SDK cheaper than TrueData. Databento: best Python DX for equities+futures.
Shoonya completely free broker API. Market Data $30/mo with OPRA since 2005 + Python SDK.
Definedge 20yr daily history. ORATS 15+yr (2007+) with 500+ analytics.
Unique GEX/DEX/VEX/CHEX data. 15 Greeks incl higher-order. 0DTE specialist. No India equivalent.
Both free tiers. Shoonya for India. Market Data 100 req/day free for US equity options.
No single provider covers India + US. You need separate providers per market.
No global provider (Databento, Polygon, etc.) covers Indian options data at all.
CME futures options gap improved: now 5+ providers (Databento, IVolatility, AlgoSeek, IQFeed, Barchart).
For Greek computation from raw data: Black-Scholes works for European-style Indian index options.
Broker APIs (Dhan, Shoonya, Upstox) are free/cheap but need trading accounts and may lack expired contract history.
NEW: Market Data (free tier) and FlashAlpha (free tier) provide viable free US entry points.
Sign up free tiers (Shoonya, Dhan, Market Data free, FlashAlpha free, Polygon free). Test API reliability.
Add paid trials (Databento free credits, ThetaData trial, Dhan data API, TrueData trial). Compare data completeness.
Run daily EOD pulls for 10-20 key underlyings. Validate data quality, compute Greeks from raw data where needed.
Finalize provider selection based on cost/quality trade-offs. Build ingestion pipeline for Index Study Lab.
Dhan: $6/mo with Greeks + Python SDK — best value India provider discovered.
FlashAlpha: Unique GEX/DEX/VEX gamma exposure data — no other provider offers this.
Market Data: Free US equity options tier with OPRA since 2005 — best free US entry.
AlgoSeek, Barchart: Additional CME futures options coverage — previously hardest gap.
Definedge: 20-year daily history from broker API — best backtesting depth among Indian broker APIs.
IQFeed: Tick-by-tick real-time with dynamic Greeks — best real-time + historical US combo.
